title: Problems and Questions Submitted by Learners of English

section.title: Problems and Questions Submitted by Learners of English
section.summary: General vocabulary and common expressions frequently queried by English language learners, including terms like 'puzzling', 'up to now', and 'eventually'.

questions.prompt: What is the translation of the word 'for' in the context of duration?
questions.explanation: According to the vocabulary list, 'for' translates to 'pendant'.

questions.prompt: What is the translation of 'topic'?
questions.explanation: In the source text, 'topic' is defined as 'sujet'.

questions.prompt: What is the translation of 'shy'?
questions.explanation: According to the vocabulary list, 'shy' translates to 'timide'.

questions.prompt: What is the translation of 'view'?
questions.explanation: In the source text, 'view' is defined as 'opinion'.

questions.prompt: What is the translation of 'to seem'?
questions.explanation: The source document translates 'to seem' as 'sembler'.

questions.prompt: What is the translation of 'to attend'?
questions.explanation: The vocabulary list defines 'to attend' as 'participer à'.

questions.prompt: What is the translation of 'up to now'?
questions.explanation: The source document translates 'up to now' as 'jusqu’à présent'.

questions.prompt: What is the translation of 'relative' in a family context?
questions.explanation: In the vocabulary list, 'relative' is defined as 'parent'.

questions.explanation: According to the source, 'to improve' means 'améliorer'.

questions.explanation: The source text translates 'otherwise' as 'autrement'.

questions.explanation: The source list defines 'rule' as 'règle'.
